description_long: This is a tall, rectangular bottle with a narrow neck and a decorative exterior. The front face features a colorful, detailed illustration of a building and landscape, possibly a landmark, with a gold medallion-like emblem near the top. The bottle is predominantly black with some white and gray areas, and the artwork is bordered by a gold trim. The sides and back are less decorated, with one side showing a circular white label with text and the back mostly plain with some streaks and smudges. The cap is solid and appears to be integrated or sealed, and the bottle's surface is glossy and hard, likely made of ceramic or glass. There are no visible signs of significant damage, but some surface irregularities and paint streaks are present.
description: A tall, rectangular black bottle with a colorful illustrated label on the front and a glossy, hard surface. Decorative gold accents and a solid cap complete its distinctive look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the illustrated label with a building and landscape, gold emblem, and decorative trim.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals a circular white label with text and less decoration, mostly black surface.
description_view_2: Back view is mostly plain black with some streaks and minimal decoration.
description_view_3: Right side view shows a mostly black and white surface with visible paint streaks and no labels.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front label features a colorful illustration of a building and landscape with a gold medallion emblem; left side has a circular white label with text.
attribute_damage_or_deformation: Some surface irregularities and paint streaks, but no major damage visible.
